ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar May-25-2017 Off Calendar

Off Calendar May-30-2017 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-09-2017 Continued To May-30-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-18-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Helene Wenzel for Deb Kinney.

The Court asked if there was anything else regarding the notice issue. Ms. Wenzel asked for notice to be waived, explained that it was actually double notice and that everything went out in the mail on the same day. The Court stated that it will waive notice and that the defects in the notice are waived. The Court granted the petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Nancy Wong. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)
